subject: Re: Fwd: Application for Right-Of-Way Easement
body:
pay it

> This is an easement under state grazing land that we
> lease.  The  easement is 
> necessary to legitimize the portion of the dakota 
> well water pipe running 
> through that land.  I guess the bottom line is  that
> if we wish to use dakota 
> and transport water from the well to the  parts of
> the ranch serviced by the 
> well, we need this easement.
>  
> I believe the easement covers approximately 432 rods
> at $30 per  rod and the 
> total $13,144 price includes the total price of the
> easement for 432  rods and 
> an additional $175 of fees.
>  
> I have told Karen to hold the easement request until
> you approve the  
> $13,144.  However, as you have asked me many times
> "Do I have a  choice?";  I do not 
> believe that you do.

body_html:
pay it

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

This is an easement under state grazing land that we
lease. The easement is
necessary to legitimize the portion of the dakota
well water pipe running
through that land. I guess the bottom line is that
if we wish to use dakota
and transport water from the well to the parts of
the ranch serviced by the
well, we need this easement.

I believe the easement covers approximately 432 rods
at $30 per rod and the
total $13,144 price includes the total price of the
easement for 432 rods and
an additional $175 of fees.

I have told Karen to hold the easement request until
you approve the
$13,144. However, as you have asked me many times
"Do I have a choice?"; I do not
believe that you do.

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)

Confidentiality Notice: This communication and any

this communication in error,
please immediately delete it and all copies, and
promptly notify the sender at
the above telephone number or electronic mail
address. Nothing in this
communication is intended to operate as an
electronic signature under applicable
law.

From: Zorroranch@aol.com
Date: Fri, 30 Jun 2006 15:02:48 EDT
Subject: Application for Right-Of-Way Easement
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Dear Darren,
For you reference the NM State Land Office
Application for Right-Of-Way
Easement for the water pipeline that runs thru the
GR-2122, will have a fee of
$12,969.00 (432.3 rod/acres at $30.00 per rod/acre)
If you have any questions or concerns please call
Warmest regards
Karen
